name: Pixelpaw Labs
description:
To design three interaction systems that make complex input mapping intuitive, scalable, and error-free within the existing product ecosystem.
1. Reduce Cognitive Load

The product is doing something complex:

Mouse + gamepad simultaneously
Multi-step macros
Auto-switching profiles

👉 Without good design:
= confusion

Your role:

Make complexity feel simple

2. Build System Clarity

From the brief :

Dual-role inputs
Macro sequences
Profile automation

These are not features—they are systems with rules

Your job:

Make those rules visible and understandable

3. Ensure Interaction Consistency

You are extending an existing product.

That means:
Same patterns
Same behavior logic
No visual or interaction breaks
Your goal:

Make new features feel like they always belonged

4. Prevent Errors (Very important)

Example:

Conflict in Phase Mode
Wrong macro assignment
Incorrect profile switching
Your job:

Design for clarity + prevention, not correction

5. Enable Power Without Overwhelm

This is a power-user product

Bad design:
→ overwhelming

Good design:
→ empowering

Your goal:

Progressive complexity (simple first, advanced when needed)
prompt_template:
I'm building an interactive prototype for a desktop app called PixelPlay. The canvas
is 1612×906px. Here is the design system to use throughout:
Colors:
- Primary/accent: #B3A7FF (lavender purple)
- Text primary: #1a1a1a
- Text secondary: #888888
- Card background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3)
- Card border: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.4)
Typography:
- Caption / small label: 12px regular
- Body: 14px regular
- Body strong / emphasized label: 14px semi-bold
- Section header: 20px semi-bold
- Page title: 28px semi-bold
Card style (used everywhere):
- Background: rgba(255,255,255,0.3)
- Backdrop filter: blur(20px) saturate(120%)
- Border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.4)
- Border radius: 16px
Animations:
- Screen fade: 400ms ease
- Sidebar open/close: 300ms ease, slides in from the right
- Cards entering screen: each card slides up from 40px below and fades in,
staggered 200ms apart, with a spring bounce feel
- Pill selector: white pill slides between options with a 500ms spring transition
- Sidebar items: fade and slide up from 20px below, staggered 150ms apart
Background: a full-bleed image. For prototyping, use a dark gradient:
linear-gradient(135deg, #1a1a2e 0%, #16213e 50%, #0f3460
100%)
